purpose: Blind target for the Ward-projected hadronic transport computation (fix items A-05 / SLP-03). The payload computation MUST NOT read this file, CODATA alpha, the SL-3 pixel estimate, or any quantity downstream of them; blindness is enforced by the dependency-cone audit (V-08). Comparison happens once, publicly, after the payload is emitted.

evaluation_point.description: Public endpoint pixel (SL-3 estimate from CODATA alpha)

required_values.note_display_packet: The ledger display packet 0.041164012378350542050005414212806737971 is the CODATA-minus-model difference on the default display chain; it is a distinct coordinate from Delta_source_residual at the endpoint package. Both are recorded here so neither can be retro-fitted.

pass_criterion: The blind payload's emitted Delta_source (or equivalently S at the declared x) lands inside the interval implied by CODATA alpha uncertainty (2.1e-8 on alpha_inv) propagated through the declared chain. Landing outside falsifies the SL-2/SL-3 closure as formulated.

declared_outcomes.pass: CL-1/CL-2 close; alpha row moves to the compression scorecard outputs column; stage-4 sharpened digits are registered in the prediction registry.
declared_outcomes.fail: SL-2/SL-3 as formulated are recorded as falsified in the closure ledger; axiom revision, if any, is a new frozen registration.

provenance: Values transcribed from reverse-engineering-reality/code/P_derivation/README.md (Full derivation claim boundary; Hierarchy certificate handoff) as of 2026-07-14, prior to any payload construction.
